–1. Also called RABBATH
  .A city east of the Jordan River, originally belonging to the 
AmmonitesJos 13:25
  .Bedstead of the giant named Og, kept atDe 3:11
  .Captured by David2Sa 11:1;12:26-31;1Ch 20:1-3
  .Possessed again by the Ammonites; prophesied againstJer 49:2,3;Eze 21:20;25:5;Am 1:14
–2. A city in the territory of the tribe of JudahJos 
15:60
